title: Arbitration Agreement
description: Agreement to resolve disputes through binding arbitration, waiving rights to court trials and jury reviews.
whatsCovered: Waiver of right to jury trial and class action lawsuits
Arbitration rules framework selection (AAA, JAMS, ICC)
Number of arbitrators and selection processes
Location and venue of the arbitration hearings
whenToUse: Use this arbitration contract to settle a commercial conflict privately, bypassing public court systems.

fields.label: Arbitration Venue Location
fields.placeholder: e.g. New York County, New York

clauses.heading: ARBITRATION AGREEMENT
clauses.body: This agreement or policy (the "Agreement") is executed as of {effective_date} (the "Effective Date"), by and between {party_a_name}, residing/located at {party_a_address} ("First Party"), and {party_b_name}, residing/located at {party_b_address} ("Second Party").

clauses.heading: 1. Core Framework
clauses.body: This agreement establishes the legal rights, bylaws, transfers, waivers, or consent structures for the Arbitration Agreement. The parties agree to adhere to the terms and declarations set out below.

clauses.heading: 2. Binding Arbitrator Rulings
clauses.body: Disputes shall be submitted to binding arbitration under the rules of {arbitration_rules} in location: {arbitration_location}. Quorums are final.

clauses.heading: General Legal Terms
clauses.body: This document constitutes the entire understanding between the parties. Any amendments must be made in writing and executed by both parties.

clauses.heading: Governing Law
clauses.body: This Agreement shall be governed and interpreted under the laws of the State/Country of {governing_state}.

faq.question: Can I customize this legal template?
faq.answer: Yes, you can edit this template using the online editor, and add custom schedules or exhibits.

faq.question: Is this agreement binding?
faq.answer: Yes, once signed by all parties, it becomes a legally binding contract under state laws.
